auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Podscribe API key sent as a Bearer token. Podscribe provides keys for public API access.

actions.name: get_integration_health
actions.description: Retrieve Podscribe integration health, optionally filtered by advertiser and including pixel data.

advertiserName.description: Advertiser name used to filter integration health.

withPixels.description: Whether to include pixel data for the advertiser.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving Podscribe integration health. advertiserName is required when withPixels is true.

reported_at.description: The timestamp when Podscribe last reported the issue.

items.description: A pixel action associated with the issue.

actions.description: Pixel actions associated with the issue when Podscribe includes action details.

items.description: An integration issue returned by Podscribe.

last_url.description: The last URL that triggered the pixel.

last_seen.description: The timestamp when Podscribe last saw the pixel.

items.description: Pixel data returned with integration health.

pixels.description: Pixel data returned for this integration.

items.description: An integration health item returned by Podscribe.

outputSchema.description: Integration health items returned by Podscribe.

actions.name: get_show_info
actions.description: Retrieve Podscribe show information by iTunes or YouTube identifier.

id.description: iTunes ID, YouTube channel ID, or YouTube playlist ID.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving Podscribe show info.

podscribeSeriesId.description: The unique show identifier in Podscribe.

title.description: The podcast or video series title.

platform.description: The platform associated with the show.

monthlyListeners.description: Estimated monthly listeners for the show.

monthlyDownloads.description: Estimated monthly downloads for the show.

ytAvgDownloadsPerEpisode.description: Estimated average YouTube views per episode.

ytMonthlyDownloads.description: Estimated monthly YouTube views for the show.

spotifyAvgDownloadsPerEpisode.description: Estimated average Spotify downloads per episode.

spotifyMonthlyDownloads.description: Estimated monthly Spotify downloads for the show.

rumbleAvgDownloadsPerEpisode.description: Estimated average Rumble downloads per episode.

rumbleMonthlyDownloads.description: Estimated monthly Rumble downloads for the show.

podcastDownloads.description: Estimated monthly podcast downloads for the show.

podcastAvgDownloadsPerEpisode.description: Estimated average podcast downloads per episode.

directRes.description: The percentage of ads classified as direct response.

hostRead.description: The percentage of ads read by the host.

countAds.description: The total number of ads Podscribe has found for the show.

topAdvertisers.description: Top advertisers returned for the show.

renewalRate.description: The advertiser renewal-rate proxy returned by Podscribe.

adLoad.description: The podcast ad load returned by Podscribe.

adLoadYT.description: The YouTube ad load returned by Podscribe.

isPodscribePrefixPlaced.description: Whether the Podscribe prefix is placed on the show.

optedIntoSpotifyVideo.description: Whether the show opted into Spotify video.

actions.name: search_episodes
actions.description: Search Podscribe episodes by query string with optional time frame, media type, and show filters.

timeFrame.description: Number of days to look back.

transcriptOnly.description: Whether to search only in transcripts.

excludeAds.description: Whether to exclude ads from search results.

showFilterIds.description: Show IDs used to filter episode search results.

oneOf.description: The media type used to filter episode search results.

items.description: The media type used to filter episode search results.

oneOf.description: Media type values used to filter episode search results.

mediaType.description: The media type values used to filter episode search results.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for searching Podscribe episodes.

items.description: An episode returned by Podscribe episode search.
